node.html: I'm a Third Year Computer Science Engineering Student at PES University, Bengaluru. Primarily interested in Machine Learning, LLMs, Gen-AI. I know a little bit of everything.

Hello! I'm Adhi Nandan J.

I am a creative, time punctual, dedicated, goal-oriented individual with decent moral Values and Ethicates along with a high-energy level, honed communication skills, strong organizational skills, and meticulous attention to detail.

I am pursuing my Bachelors from PES University, Bengaluru in Computer Science and Engineering (2021-2025) my current GPA is 9.11 out of 10.

Here are a few of the other technologies/ languages I'm working with now:

• Built a scouting system in football using xG as a metric.
  • Contributed extensively in web scraping, data preprocessing and optimizations.
  • Implemented the API integration of the frontend and backend and made a dynamic scouting webpage.
This project helps in scouting underrated and undervalued players using xG as a metric in football.
This project aims to facilitate the reporting and tracking of lost and found items on campus by providing a centralized database and user-friendly interface for students and staff members.
This is the backend working implementation of decentralised cryptocurrency exchange platform. This project is under works and the frontend will be included as well.

This project utilizes Streamlit, Hugging Face Transformers (LaMini-T5-738M, LLAMA), LangChain (CSV Loader, Chroma), Sentence Transformer (all-MiniLM-L6-v2), FAISS, MiniLM, and Tempfile to create interactive chatbots for processing and analyzing PDF and CSV data.
This project allows users to ask questions about an uploaded image and receive responses from a conversational AI agent.
This project detects the position of the person performing a particular exercise and tells if the posture is good or bad, and it also give tips on how to correct the posture.
This project detects the face through the webcam and logs in the time the face is captured in a csv file along with the person's name.
This is a python-based client-server auction system where the server utilizes sockets and threading to handle multiple client connections and implements a lock for secure offer submission.

This project is a dues management system designed for students. It allows students to authenticate using their Student Registration Number (SRN) and password, view their dues for various departments, and clear them individually.
This is a project done during the Kodikon hackathon.
My inbox is always open. Whether you have a question or just want to say hello, I'll try my best to get back to you! Feel free to mail me about any relevant job updates.
